summary: Completed testing of Video Walkthrough feature for CoinQuest. All backend endpoints (GET, PUT, DELETE /api/admin/settings/walkthrough-video and POST /api/upload/walkthrough-video) working correctly. Frontend Admin Video Management page (/admin/video) fully functional with video preview, upload, settings, and delete capabilities. Landing page correctly shows/hides video section based on configuration.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/admin/settings/walkthrough-video - returns video data or null (public access)
✅ PUT /api/admin/settings/walkthrough-video - requires admin auth (401 without auth)
✅ PUT /api/admin/settings/walkthrough-video - updates video settings with admin auth
✅ DELETE /api/admin/settings/walkthrough-video - requires admin auth (401 without auth)
✅ DELETE /api/admin/settings/walkthrough-video - deletes video with admin auth
✅ POST /api/upload/walkthrough-video - accepts video file upload (mp4, webm, mov)
✅ Full workflow: upload → set settings → verify → delete
✅ Admin dashboard shows 'Walkthrough Video' management card
✅ Admin Video Management page (/admin/video) accessible and functional
✅ Video preview section displays current video
✅ Title and description inputs work correctly
✅ Delete Video button removes video with confirmation
✅ Landing page shows video section when video is configured
✅ Landing page hides video section when no video is configured
✅ Video section positioned between Features and Grade Levels sections

backend_endpoints.PUT /api/admin/settings/walkthrough-vide: Admin-only endpoint to update video settings
backend_endpoints.POST /api/upload/walkthrough-video: Upload endpoint for video files (mp4, webm, mov)

landing_page_integration.conditional_rendering: Video section only appears when video URL is set
landing_page_integration.position: Between Features and Grade Levels sections

critical_code_review_comments: Backend admin.py lines 991-1038: Site settings endpoints properly implemented with admin auth
Backend uploads.py lines 152-175: Walkthrough video upload endpoint handles file validation correctly
Frontend AdminVideoManagement.jsx: Well-structured component with proper state management and API integration
Frontend LandingPage.jsx lines 264-309: Conditional video section rendering works correctly
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: None required - feature uses site_settings collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video Walkthrough feature fully tested and working. Backend stores video settings in site_settings collection with key 'walkthrough_video'. Frontend AdminVideoManagement.jsx handles all CRUD operations. Landing page conditionally renders video section based on walkthroughVideo state fetched from API. Test file created at /app/backend/tests/test_walkthrough_video.py for regression testing.
